assertions.description: Output is in email/DM format with a subject line, body under 200 words in three natural paragraphs
Opening references something specific about the recipient's work, not generic praise
Closing ask is a single, specific, low-friction next step

assertion_results.note: Email format with subject line, body at 178 words in three paragraphs
Opens referencing the AI copyright piece specifically
DM format appropriate for local pitch, body at 142 words
Email format at 188 words for professional EU context
References their European Media Freedom Act analysis specifically
Asks for a call to discuss the co-authored piece scope

methodology: Binary assertion testing: 3 inputs (standard, minimal, European context) x 3 assertions per skill. Each assertion graded pass/fail based on whether generated output satisfies the requirement.
